---
title: "Visual Information Discovery in Large Data Sets"
author:
  - name: Martin Šperka
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2010-06-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "INTELS'2010 - Ninth International Symposium on Intelligent Systems"
  publisher: "RUSAKI, Moskva"
  isbn: "978-5-93347-407-4"
  page: "123-128"
---
